title: Analysts To Review Emerging Local, Global Market Trends At Investdata Q3 Master Class Saturday - FinancialEDGE
description: Amid the raging uncertainties across the globe, the management of Investdata Consulting Limited, on Friday announced plans to hold its long-running Master Class this Saturday, June 28, 2025. The Master Class for the 2025Q3, holding virtually, is scheduled to begin at 9 am prompt. As usual, equity market and economic experts have been carefully selected
html:
Amid the raging uncertainties across the globe, the management of Investdata Consulting Limited, on Friday announced plans to hold its long-running Master Class this Saturday, June 28, 2025.

The Master Class for the 2025Q3, holding virtually, is scheduled to begin at 9 am prompt.

As usual, equity market and economic experts have been carefully selected to speak to various aspects of the theme for this quarter: “Unlocking Trading Opportunities On NGX Amidst Fundamental Shift In Global Macroeconomic & Uncertainties.”

While Alhaji Garba Kurfi, a charterered accountant, economic/equity market analyst, trader of over three decades and chief executive officer of APT Securities & Funds Limited, will take participants through “A Macro View of the Nigerian Stock Market & How To Navigate,” drawing on experiences gathered over many seasons; Mr Abdul-Rasheed Momoh, a technical analyst of over two decades and Executive Director, Operations at TRW Stockbroking Limited, will show how all of the developments today can be interpreted accurately for profitable trading by looking at the charts. He session will focus on: “It’s All In Charts- Trading Profitability with Price Actions & Other Technical Tools.

Mr Peter Sunday Adebola, Managing Director/CEO Edgefield Capital Management Limited will speak on: “The Power of Reliable Dividend & Earnings Amid Portfolio Realignments;” while Mr. Ambrose Omordion, Chief Research Officer, Investdata Consulting Limited, will participants unlock “The Power Of The Volume Factor In Trends.”

As bonus, he will also discuss “five Stocks To Ride On At the NGX Pullback.

According to Omordion, “this 2025 Master Class is for those who have been searching for an edge in today’s volatile markets.

“The Investdata Q3 master class is a high powered event for traders and investors trading actively on the NGX who blend the power of technical and fundamental analyses into a single, streamlined strategy for all market conditions.

“At this Master Class where we will reveal the powerful strategies and techniques now helping traders spot real trends, hold winning trades longer to boost your portfolio return,” he stressed.

According to Omordion, “the NGX 2025 market volatility continues to create wealth for smart traders and discerning investors who dared to take action, or are ready to take action.

“If you have been wondering how this market uptrend or pullbacks will affect your investments; what steps you must take to protect your portfolio and grow it in Q3 and beyond; or when markets would recover based on historical patterns, if it pulls back, this Master Class is for you,” he stressed.

For him, the topics and speakers have been carefully selected to help participants identify trends easily, discover techniques to identify bullish and bearish trends more accurately, allowing for better decision-making

The power-packed Master Class, he assured, will also help participants improve their entry and exit strategies.

As usual, participants will also be exposed to a bouquet of stocks sure to offer better returns than the level of inflation over the next 91 days.

The theme and speakers, he said have been put together to help participants navigate uncertainties in the market, “it’s all about investing and trading knowledge that has delivered consistent profits and boost confidence, even during recent market volatility and uptrend,” Omordion added.

To details about the virtual event, the statement urged prospective participants who wants to be among successful investors and traders in Q3 2025, to indicate by sending: “Yes” to: 08028164085, or 08179547605.
